utility_evaluation.REASONING:
There are 5 items requested in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 appear in the final coverage plan. Now check if each is fully specified with all required details:
- health_coverage: Requires physical and mental health insurance with costs. Plan includes both (Physical + Mental) and a single combined cost (€700/month). This meets the requirement.
- property_coverage: Requires home/contents insurance with costs. Plan lists home content coverage and cost (€155/month). This meets the requirement.
- travel_coverage: Requires travel insurance with costs. Plan lists travel coverage and cost (€230/month). This meets the requirement.
- additional_services: Requires any enhancement services with costs. Plan lists a premium membership and cost (€20/month). This meets the requirement.
- total_budget: Requires complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. Plan provides monthly and annual totals before benefits, a benefits reduction, and net monthly/annual out-of-pocket. This meets the requirement.
